principles: Dashboard zeigt Tageslage aus data/YYYY-MM-DD/findings.json, nicht nur Run-Delta.
Emergency RSS writer ist Fallback, nicht Lagebild.
Einzelne Quellenfehler begrenzen Coverage, brechen aber nicht den Feed.

new_findings.title: What actually drives software development costs (and why most budgets get it wrong)
new_findings.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
new_findings.summary: Every project I’ve worked on that went over budget had one thing in common: the people paying for it thought they understood what they were buying. They had a quote, a timeline, and a feature list. What they didn’t have was a real picture of what drives cost in software development. And that gap is expensive.
